assertions.reason: The landing page loaded successfully in 565ms with the hero section, care-domain and feature highlights, testimonial/social-proof content, and primary CTA buttons visible. No console errors were observed.
At a 375px-wide viewport, the landing page remained legible, the desktop navigation collapsed into a hamburger menu, and the page showed no horizontal overflow.
The primary Get Started CTA correctly navigated to /register, but the Book a Demo CTA did not open a public demo-booking flow. It redirected to /login?callbackUrl=%2Fdemo instead.
The pricing page loaded successfully and displayed Free, Professional, and Enterprise tiers with names, prices/descriptions, feature summaries, and a CTA per tier. No console errors were observed.

The pricing page included a detailed comparison table grouped across Care Management, EMAR & Clinical, Staff Management, Compliance, AI Features, and Platform, which is sufficient for plan comparison.

The monthly/annual billing toggle updated prices immediately. The annual state displayed a Save 20% badge and discounted annual-equivalent pricing (for example, Professional at £119/mo billed annually).
Clicking the Professional tier CTA preserved the selected plan context on the registration page via the URL parameter /register?plan=professional.

frictions.description: A cookie-consent banner appears on first load and partially covers the landing page until dismissed.
frictions.resolution: Rejected cookies before capturing clean landing-page evidence.

notes: Validated only the public marketing surface at http://localhost:3200 with browser-only testing.
VAL-MARKET-007 preserved plan context in the URL only; the registration form itself did not visibly display the selected plan.
